title: Senior Revenue Manager at Yatra Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Yatra Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Yatra Hotels is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Yatra Hotels:
Yatra Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
